name: TRL (Transformer Reinforcement Learning)

auth.notes: HF_TOKEN for HuggingFace Hub model upload; no auth for local training

performance.notes: Training throughput; GPU-dependent; LoRA significantly reduces VRAM requirements

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace library for fine-tuning LLMs with RLHF, DPO, SFT, PPO, and GRPO. SFTTrainer: supervised fine-tuning with PEFT/LoRA. DPOTrainer: Direct Preference Optimization. PPOTrainer: Proximal Policy Optimization with reward models. GRPO: Group Relative Policy Optimization (DeepSeek-R1 training method). Supports quantization (bitsandbytes). Integrates with transformers, PEFT, accelerate, datasets. Standard for open-source LLM fine-tuning and alignment research.

gotchas: Rapidly evolving API — check docs for latest trainer arguments
GPU memory requirements significant even with LoRA (8GB+ recommended)
RLHF (PPO) training is unstable and requires careful hyperparameter tuning
DPO data format is specific (chosen/rejected pairs)
best_when: Fine-tuning open-source LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral, Gemma) with SFT + LoRA
Alignment training with DPO using preference data
RLHF pipelines for research or production AI systems
Teams implementing GRPO for reasoning model training
summary: TRL is HuggingFace's library for LLM fine-tuning with RLHF, DPO, SFT, PPO, and GRPO. SFTTrainer for supervised fine-tuning with LoRA/QLoRA. DPOTrainer for preference-based alignment. PPOTrainer for reward model training. GRPO for DeepSeek-R1 style reasoning. Integrates with transformers, PEFT, accelerate, and bitsandbytes. The standard toolkit for open-source LLM alignment research and production fine-tuning.
